findings.location: s1 — XML code example, WorkflowDefinitionSchema component comment
findings.description: The XML comment for boundary event column properties was changed from the source. Source says `<!-- 境界イベント、境界イベントトリガーテーブルのカラム名 -->` (both boundary event table AND boundary event trigger table), but knowledge file says `<!-- 境界イベントテーブルのカラム名 -->` (boundary event table only), dropping the reference to the boundary event trigger table.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `<!-- 境界イベント、境界イベントトリガーテーブルのカラム名 -->`
